view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for location selection by the customer is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for location selection by the customer is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of 'Location selection by customer' as evidenced by the successful booking of appointments at different locations. The linked use case describes a scenario where patients can book at any location, which is further supported by the evidence of confirmed bookings for multiple customers. Additionally, the prior steps indicate that the system allows for location-specific management and booking, confirming the requirement is met.
